call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. So, to get this rolling, we just need to verify a few details. Can I confirm your address? 
Eleanor: Yes, it's… [address confirmed]. 
Agent: Perfect. And just to confirm, you're employed as a… 
Eleanor: Yes, [employment confirmed]. 
Agent: Wonderful. Okay, Eleanor, I'm going to go ahead and process this for you. You'll receive an email with the final loan agreement within the hour. 
Eleanor: Great, thank you!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2,500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark mentioned something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 12.5%? That seems a little high. I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: I understand. However, given your self-employment status, that's a very competitive rate. We can explore options, but 12.5% is the best we can offer initially. The monthly payments would be around $330 for 60 months. 
Jessica: Hmm. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but no annual fees or prepayment penalties. 
Jessica: Okay. And what if I pay it off early? 
Agent: No penalty whatsoever. You can pay it off at any time without incurring extra charges. 
Jessica: Alright. I need to think about it. I want to shop around a bit. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed loan proposal via email outlining all the terms and conditions. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great. 
Agent: Excellent. I'll send that over right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. 
Jessica: Thanks, David.

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I did. Just checking out my options. 
Agent: Great! We're offering a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 16.99%. It comes with rewards points and travel insurance. 
Michael: 16.99% is a bit high, honestly. I've seen lower rates elsewhere. 
Agent: I understand. It depends on your credit profile. However, our card offers a lot of benefits. 
Michael: Yeah, but the interest rate is the biggest factor for me. I'm not sure it's worth it. 
Agent: Well, we can explore other options, but this is the best rate we can offer at this time. 
Michael: I appreciate it, but I think I'll pass for now. Thanks anyway. 
Agent: Okay, Michael. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Davis? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're offering a personal loan… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you serious? I'm unemployed! I can't afford that! This is harassment! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Patricia: No, you please! Put me on your do-not-call list! And don't ever call me again! *click*
